sources.description:

Evil Born - When baby Sebastian is born on 12/12/12 everyone around him starts to die. Pretty soon, his mother realizes that her son is the spawn of Hell..

2012
Stars: Sara Malakul Lane, Rubén Guevara, Steve Hanks
